name: Intertainment AG
summary: Intertainment AG engages in the acquisition and exploitation of film rights in Europe. It is also involved in the trading of film licenses; and production, co-production, and merchandising of films. The company distributes its films through various distribution channels, such as cinema, DVD, pay-TV, and free-TV. Intertainment AG was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Feldafing, Germany.
